examples.title: Algorithm: CLI Command Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates how OS processes command-line interface commands
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ProcessCLICommand
BEGIN
 1. READ user_input FROM terminal
 2. PARSE user_input INTO command AND arguments
 3. IF command EXISTS IN system_call_table THEN
 a. EXECUTE system_call(command, arguments)
 b. RETURN output TO user
 4. ELSE
 a. RETURN 'Command not found' error
END
explanation: Step 2: Tokenizes input into command and parameters
Step 3a: Uses system call table for command validation

examples.title: File Open System Call
examples.description: Using open() system call to access OS file management
explanation: open() system call interacts directly with OS kernel
Error handling demonstrates OS resource management

examples.title: Directory Listing API
examples.description: Using os module to interface with OS file system
explanation: os.listdir() wraps underlying OS system calls
Exception handling shows OS error reporting
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n = number of entries

examples.title: System Command Execution
examples.description: Using Runtime API to execute OS commands
explanation: Shows JVM interaction with host OS
